description_long: This is a yellow school bus with a distinctive retro-futuristic design, featuring four large, angular metallic fins attached to its sides. The bus body is elongated with rounded front and rear ends, and it has a raised rear roof section. The front displays two large circular headlights and a black bumper, while the sides are lined with evenly spaced rectangular windows. The text 'NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT AUTHORITY' is visible along the side, and the bus has black wheels partially covered by the fins. The overall surface appears to be made of painted metal with some plastic and glass components, and the bus is designed to accommodate multiple passengers.
description: A yellow school bus with large metallic fins on its sides, retro styling, and 'NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT AUTHORITY' signage. It features rounded ends, rectangular windows, and a raised rear roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, two large circular headlights, black bumper, and the four side fins extending outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full row of rectangular windows, the 'NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT AUTHORITY' text, and the prominent side fins.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the raised roof section, rear lights, and the symmetrical placement of the side fins.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible windows, side fins, and the bus's streamlined profile.
attribute_school_bus_signage: Text 'NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT AUTHORITY' in black, all caps, sans-serif font along the lower side panels; no visible 'SCHOOL BUS' text on the front or rear.
attribute_front_grille_design: The front grille consists of two large, round, black openings above the bumper, with no visible slats or mesh; the area is simple and unadorned, lacking emblems.
attribute_window_arrangement: Each side has a row of 10 rectangular windows, evenly spaced, with black window frames; a smaller driver window is present at the front, and no emergency exit windows are visible.
